title: Suspicious cloud login and credential phishing report
environment: Small company using cloud email and VPN
incident_notes: A user reported receiving a message asking them to verify their mailbox quota through an external link.
Shortly after the user clicked the link, a successful login was observed from 203.0.113.42 from an unusual country.
The same account attempted to create a new inbox forwarding rule to external-recipient@example.net.
MFA challenge logs show repeated prompts before the successful login.
The user said they approved one MFA push because they thought IT was testing the system.
initial_question: Determine likely incident type, extract indicators, map possible attack patterns, estimate risk, and recommend first response actions.
